untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of 'acceleration rate > 0.5 standard deviations' which is not a native allowed indicator. Acceleration rate requires computing second-order derivatives of price movement. Substituted with 'returns' magnitude as proxy for price momentum, and Donchian breakouts as proxy for swing high breaks, but true acceleration measurement is unavailable.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_28_2: (1) 'Price acceleration' modeled via returns exceeding threshold (0.5% approximates 0.5 stddev context). (2) Volume condition directly translatable via vol_ratio_20 > 1.1. (3) 'Recent swing high' modeled as dc_upper (20-period Donchian high). (4) CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved with both entry_long and entry_short conditions. (5) Exit on close reversal or acceleration becoming negative (returns sign change). (6) 4% stop loss explicitly set. (7) Regimes mapped to TRENDING_UP/DOWN, HIGH_VOL, ANY as contextual match.
